category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a text-mode multi-protocol instant messaging client; GitHub README describes CenterIM 5 as a text-mode IM client using libpurple: https://github.com/petrpavlu/centerim5
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README names the project CenterIM 5: https://github.com/petrpavlu/centerim5
source_facts.source-archive release path also uses centerim5.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository exposes README as the primary documentation surface: https://github.com/petrpavlu/centerim5
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/petrpavlu/centerim5, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README says CenterIM 5 is a text-mode IM client using libpurple: https://github.com/petrpavlu/centerim5
